title: Memorandum of Understanding between National Institute of Technology Raipur and VNR Vignana Jyothi Institute of Engineering and Technology
summary: The MoU enables collaborative research, academic cooperation, joint project proposals, exchange of academic and scientific information, and mobility of faculty and students between NITRR and VNRVJIET. It covers workshops, seminars, FDPs, student internships, joint publications, IPR, and access to research facilities.
why_this_matters: It establishes a formal structure for research collaboration and academic exchange between NITRR and VNRVJIET, supporting joint activities and resource sharing.
key_highlights: Joint research projects and collaborative work leading to Ph.D. outcomes.
Joint project proposals to DST, DBT, UGC, AICTE, NRB, DRDO and similar agencies.
Shared access to research facilities of both institutes as per norms.
Faculty mobility for Ph.D. guidance, teaching, and research work.
Student internships for 6 to 8 weeks at either institute.
Joint workshops, seminars, conferences, and FDP programmes.
Joint publications, book chapters, and shared IPR for collaborative outputs.

faculty_benefits.faculty_academic_benefits: Joint workshops, seminars, FDPs, teaching visits, and academic cooperation.
faculty_benefits.faculty_research_benefits: Joint research work, access to research facilities, project proposals, and collaborative publications.
faculty_benefits.faculty_exchange_opportunities: Short visits for teaching, research, project work, and summer research fellowships.
faculty_benefits.faculty_ipr_publication_support: Shared IPR ownership and joint publication of conference papers, journals, and book chapters.

student_benefits.student_academic_benefits: Participation in joint workshops, conferences, seminars, and training programmes.
student_benefits.student_internship_opportunities: 6–8 week internships at NITRR or VNRVJIET under joint faculty guidance.
student_benefits.student_research_opportunities: Opportunity to participate in joint projects, project-based mobility, and 4th-year major project work.
student_benefits.student_skill_employability_benefits: Exposure to collaborative research environments and cross-institutional academic interactions.

research_opportunities_potential: Joint projects, Ph.D. guidance, societal impact projects, and collaborations with external agencies as stated in the MoU.
what_does_success_look_like: Execution of joint research projects, student/faculty exchanges, publications, and jointly organized academic programmes.
success_metrics: Count of joint projects, publications, workshops, seminars, FDPs, student internships, faculty visits, and project proposals submitted.
additional_notes: MoU includes modalities for termination, modification, separate agreements for specific activities, and arbitration under Indian law.
